title: Finder
scope: A pure-UI launcher tile that aggregates search across the apps owning the underlying data (goals, documents, recipes, reminders, schedules, …). Owns no schema, tables, migrations, chat tools, or REST routes — every search dispatches to the owning app. NOT a data store itself; Finder is a unified cross-app search surface.

specs.title: Search across apps
specs.behavior: Finder dispatches a search query to each app that owns data (goals, documents, recipes, reminders, schedules, …) and aggregates the results into one ranked view.
